title: rosa × collina var. obtusifolia
intro: Rosa × collina var. obtusifolia, also known as the wild rose, is a perennial shrub that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae). It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as a natural diuretic and anti-inflammatory, which can help alleviate symptoms of urinary tract issues and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Rosa × collina var. obtusifolia include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and even exhibit antimicrobial and antioxidant properties. Rosa × collina var. obtusifolia can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its therapeutic benefits.
